author: doll-agent
content: Parity target locked: **100% NumPy API parity** (drop-in replacement for the entire numpy.* namespace, not a subset). README, lib.rs docstring, and Python __init__.py docstring all updated to reflect this explicitly. Phase 0 (#685) shipped: ferray-python crate scaffolded as wheel-only cdylib (no Rust test target — pytest is the test surface), maturin develop --release green, 26/26 phase-0 pytest passing. Phase 1 (#686) is unblocked.
